action_set_definitions.name: get_hotel_performance_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current cumulative revenue and available room inventory from the hotel management system.

action_set_definitions.name: get_crs_request_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the specific data (room count, rate, and checkout time) for a list of micro-stay request IDs from the Central Reservation System.

request_ids.description: The specific micro-stay request IDs to investigate (e.g., SL-808).

action_set_definitions.name: accept_reservation_block
action_set_definitions.description: Accepts a specific room block request, committing it to the system and updating revenue and inventory.

request_id.description: The ID of the block to be accepted.

state_description.current_date: The current date in the simulation (YYYY-MM-DD format).
state_description.total_inventory: Total number of rooms available in the hotel.
state_description.rooms_occupied: Number of rooms currently booked/occupied for the current date.
state_description.current_price_set: The room price currently active in the market.
state_description.cumulative_revenue: Total revenue generated since the start of the simulation.
state_description.market_demand_index: A hidden multiplier (1.0 = baseline) representing seasonal or event-based demand strength.
state_description.competitor_avg_price: The average price currently offered by local competitors.
